A clear description of what the bug is.

2. Click on '...'

What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots.

- Node version: [e.g. 22.9.0]
- Claude Code version: [e.g. 2.1.91]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 130]
